text: TRUMP EXTENDS DEADLINE: Energy strike pause extended to April 6 via Truth Social — "Talks are ongoing and going very well"; Iran denied negotiations minutes before, causing Brent surge to $109/bbl, S&P -1.74% (worst day of war)

sources.name: NPR — Trump grants Iran another extension on deadline
Bloomberg — Trump Extends Pause of Iran Energy Strikes to April 6

text: WAVE 83: IRGC launches 83rd wave of 'True Promise 4' overnight — targeting Al-Dhafra (UAE), Al-Udeiri (Saudi Arabia), Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait), Sheikh Isa (Bahrain) US bases, plus Ashdod oil depot and Modi'in military site in Israel; missiles carried messages thanking Spain, Pakistan, India, Germany

sources.name: Tribune India — Iran launches 83rd wave of retaliatory strikes
ANI News — Op True Promise 4 Wave 83

text: YAZD DESTROYED: IAF strikes Iran's 'most central' naval missile and sea mine production facility in Yazd — site developed missiles for submarines, helicopters, cruise platforms; IDF: 'a significant blow to the production capabilities of the naval forces'; CENTCOM confirms 92% of Iran's large navy ships eliminated

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — IDF bombs Iran's most central naval arms production site
The Media Line — IAF strike deals significant blow to Iran's missile and naval mine production

text: 10,000 MORE TROOPS: Pentagon weighing deployment of up to 10,000 additional ground troops including 82nd Airborne and armored units to the Middle East; complements Marines already en route; Kharg Island seizure remains on table as 'final blow' option per planning documents

sources.name: Axios — Iran war Trump Pentagon more troops Middle East
Stars and Stripes — 82nd Airborne 10,000 troops Iran deployment

text: TEHRAN WAVE: IAF sends 60 jets dropping 150+ munitions on Tehran-area weapon manufacturing sites, IRGC facilities, and anti-aircraft storage — Iranian soldiers preparing missile fire targeted and killed; key ballistic missile component production site destroyed; Isfahan also struck simultaneously

sources.name: Times of Israel — Day 28 liveblog
Jerusalem Post — Tehran explosions IDF strikes weapon manufacturing

text: RUBIO G7 RIFT: Secretary of State spars with European allies at Vaux-de-Cernay Abbey — Germany: 'this war is a catastrophe'; France: 'surprised by an American ally who doesn't even bother to inform us'; 35 countries joined France-hosted military talks on Hormuz reopening; Brent $107.99, WTI $94.48

sources.name: Bloomberg — Rubio Spars With G-7 Diplomats Over Wars in Iran and Ukraine
CNBC — Iran war is a catastrophe G7 ministers warn

text: KUWAIT PORTS STRUCK: Iranian drones and cruise missiles hit both Shuwaikh Port (main commercial hub) and Mubarak Al-Kabeer Port at dawn — confirmed infrastructure damage at both; largest single attack on Kuwaiti commercial infrastructure since war began; no casualties

sources.name: Al-Arabiya — Kuwait's Shuwaikh port hit by drones causing material damage
Gulf News — Iranian drone attack hits Kuwait's Shuwaikh port amid rising Gulf tensions

text: NUCLEAR ESCALATION: IDF strikes Arak heavy water reactor (2nd strike this war), Ardakan yellowcake plant (FIRST EVER — only one of its kind), and two Isfahan steel factories — 1 killed, 15 injured; IAEA: no radiation risk; Israel Katz vows strikes will 'intensify and expand'

sources.name: Times of Israel — IDF confirms bombing Iran's heavy water reactor
Bloomberg — US-Israel hit Iran's nuclear facilities as Tehran attacks Gulf

text: HORMUZ SPIKE: Iran turns back 3 Chinese ships (COSCO) at Strait of Hormuz — IRGC: 'strait is shut'; Brent hits $112.57/bbl (highest since 2022), WTI crosses $100 for first time this war; Macquarie warns $200 oil if Hormuz stays shut through June

sources.name: Bloomberg — Two Chinese container ships attempt Hormuz exit before U-turning
CNBC — Oil price WTI Brent crude Trump Strait Hormuz tensions

text: ARAGHCHI DENIES: Iranian FM explicitly: 'No negotiations have happened with the enemy until now, and we do not plan on any negotiations' — vows 'HEAVY PRICE for Israeli crimes'; IRGC issues 'beyond eye for eye' threat; orders evacuation of US/Israeli-linked industrial workers across Gulf

sources.name: Al Jazeera liveblog — Iran war live March 27
Press TV — IRGC warns workers to evacuate US/Israeli-linked sites

text: VANCE LEADS IRAN TALKS: Trump formally names Vance as lead Iran negotiator; Vance confronted Netanyahu in 'difficult' call over regime-change oversell; German FM Wadephul: direct US-Iran meeting 'prepared' for Pakistan 'very soon'; Rubio to G7: war ends in '2-4 more weeks'

sources.name: Axios — Vance Iran peace talks
Al Arabiya — US and Iran preparing for direct talks in Pakistan, German FM says

text: BEIRUT WAVE 2: IDF launches second 'extensive' strike wave on Dahiyeh — evacuation warnings for Bourj el-Barajneh, Haret Hreik; 2 IDF soldiers killed in south Lebanon ground clashes (Bayada, Shamaa); Lebanon death toll reaches 1,142; 5 Iranian ballistic missile salvos on Israel Day 28

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — IDF launches extensive wave of strikes on Hezbollah in Beirut
Times of Israel — Day 28 liveblog

text: MARKETS DAY 28: S&P 500 -1.67% (7-month low, 5th straight weekly loss), Dow -1.73% officially in correction; Brent $112.57, WTI $99.64; US intel: only 1/3 of Iran's missiles confirmed destroyed — contradicts Trump's 'very few rockets left' claim; G7 joint statement demands Hormuz reopening

sources.name: CNN — Dow closes in correction, oil at Iran-war highs
Fox News — US-Israel-Iran war live updates March 27
